UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing settings and preferences for the Inkwell workspace

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last profile preference sync

Document.title: Document
Document.description: An aesthetic content draft written in the Inkwell workspace

title.description: The title of the aesthetic document

content.description: HTML rich text content of the document

themeId.description: Theme used to display this document

pattern.description: Background pattern used on the paper canvas

baseFontId.description: Primary typography font family ID for this document

baseFontSize.description: Font size style for this document

kerning.description: Letter spacing styling for this document

words.description: Word count of the content text

versions.description: Up to 10 lightweight manual/automatic historical draft checkpoints

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last content write

/users/{userId}/documents/{documentId}.description: Individual documents owned by the specific authenticated user
